# Music for Little Mozarts

> Group piano lessons for preschool-aged children (ages 4–5) in Reno, Nevada. The Music for Little Mozarts program is an in-person, cohort-based early childhood music curriculum held at the Steinway Piano Gallery of Reno. Classes combine piano instruction, singing, dancing, and movement activities in small groups of up to 8 students. Co-founded and taught by Christine H. Barden, who co-authored the nationally published Music for Little Mozarts curriculum.

## About

- **Type**: MusicSchool
- **Category**: Early Childhood Music Education / Preschool Piano Lessons
- **Location**: 500 E Moana Ln, Reno, NV 89502 (Steinway Piano Gallery)
- **Ages**: 4–5 years old
- **Format**: In-person group classes, 40 minutes per week, cohorts of up to 8 students
- **Program Length**: Approximately 2 years (4 book levels)
- **Email**: m4littlemozarts@gmail.com
- **Primary URL**: https://music4littlemozarts.com
- **Language**: English
- **Last Updated**: 2026-04

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://music4littlemozarts.com/): Overview of the program, studio location with map, and enrollment link
- [Program](https://music4littlemozarts.com/program): Curriculum details, cohort structure, what to expect in class, and research on benefits of early music education
- [Teachers](https://music4littlemozarts.com/teachers): Instructor bios for Christine H. Barden (curriculum co-author) and Michael Britten (composer and jazz pianist)
- [Contact](https://music4littlemozarts.com/contact): Contact form, studio address, email, class schedule info
- [Enroll](https://music4littlemozarts.com/enroll): Enrollment application for upcoming cohorts

## Instructors

- **Christine H. Barden** — Co-author of the Music for Little Mozarts curriculum (published by Alfred Music). Internationally recognized authority on early childhood music education. Graduate of San Francisco State University in piano performance. Former Director of Curriculum and National Chief Instructor for Yamaha Music Education System (17 years). Has been teaching in Reno for over 15 years.
- **Michael Britten** — Composer and jazz pianist. Graduate of Scorecraft Academy professional composition program. Earlier training at San Francisco Conservatory of Music Pre-College. Performs with Reno Phil Choir, TOCCATA, and The AJJ Jazz Singers.

## Program Details

The Music for Little Mozarts curriculum was developed by Christine H. Barden, Gayle Kowalchyk, and E. L. Lancaster. First published in 1999, it is taught in studios across the country and around the world. The program teaches piano fundamentals through story-based adventures with characters Beethoven Bear and Mozart Mouse. Each class includes keyboard instruction, singing, dancing, movement activities, workbook exercises, and flashcard drills. Parents participate in every class — no musical background required.
